channel.title: Blogs on Jcode部落格
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Jcode部落格

item.title: JavaScript
item.description: JavaScript ES6 筆記 宣告 const 常數 let 變數 const、let、var 差異 外部連結 箭頭函式 Default Parameter 參數的預設值 類別與物件 定義類別並產生物件 Constructor 定義建構式 Attribute 定義存取屬性 Metoh 定義呼叫方法 類別繼承 定義子類別並操作子類別物件 原型鍊 Static 定義呼叫靜態方法 非同步程式 使用回呼函式處理非同步程式 使用 Promise 處理非同步程式

item.title: React
item.description: React 資料會交給 JS 管理，畫面則由 JSX 處理來達到，關注點分離與元件化(資料歸資料畫面歸畫面)，達到更簡單處理 JS 與 HTML 的關係。 React 基本概述 React 以組件(component)為核心。 元件化-用來解決大量開發重複性的邏輯，達到重複利用的效果。 讓多人開發有更佳的協調性，更容易理解和除錯。 可以延伸到手機應用開發。 React Element React.createElement(型態,[屬性],[子元件]) React 設計理念 N.B. react Component 組件 Props 組件的屬性 巢狀組件結構 State 組件的狀態 Lifecycle 組件的生命週期 JSX 語法與 Babel 編輯器 JSX 基本使用與動態資料 JSX 套用樣式 CSS Style 事件處理 Event Handling 表單處理 From Handling 程式碼分工 Code Responsibility 選項開關元件 井字遊戲實務範例 Redux

item.title: Render Math With Mathjax
item.description: Mathjax Math equations can be rendered using Mathjax syntax with AMS symbol support. Optionally enable this on a per-page basis by adding mathjax: true to your frontmatter. Then, use $$ ... $$ on a line by itself to render a block equation: $$ | Pr_{x \leftarrow P_{1}} [A(x) = 1] - Pr_{x \leftarrow P_{2}} [A(x) = 1] | < \text{negligible} $$ The raw version is: $$ | Pr_{x \leftarrow P_{1}} [A(x) = 1] - Pr_{x \leftarrow P_{2}} [A(x) = 1] | < \text{negligible} $$ Write in-line equations with \\( .

item.title: Rich Content
item.description: Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds. Gist Simple Shortcode {{< gist spf13 7896402 "img.html" >}} Twitter Simple Shortcode {{< tweet GoHugoIO 1315233626070503424 >}} Profile is a customizable single-page portfolio theme for Hugo featuring a contact form and blog. Made by @gurusabarishh.https://t.co/KwYcwfdy16 — GoHugo.io (@GoHugoIO) October 11, 2020 Vimeo Simple Shortcode {{< vimeo 146022717 >}} Youtube Simple Shortcode {{< youtube w7Ft2ymGmfc >}} Theme Custom Shortcodes These shortcodes are not Hugo built-ins, but are provided by the theme.

item.title: Markdown語法
item.description: Blockquotes The blockquote element represents content that is quoted from another source, optionally with a citation which must be within a footer or cite element, and optionally with in-line changes such as annotations and abbreviations. Blockquote without attribution Tiam, ad mint andaepu dandae nostion secatur sequo quae. Note that you can use Markdown syntax within a blockquote. Blockquote with attribution Don’t communicate by sharing memory, share memory by communicating. — Rob Pike1
